jarvis: Might I suggest hydration? Your cells have been remarkably patient.
A glass of water, perhaps. I hear it's what keeps the organs from unionizing.
Hydration check. Your body is 60% water and currently filing a grievance about the other 40%.
Water, ma'am. It's nature's software update. Please install.
Your bloodstream has requested a top-up. I'm merely the courier.
Shall I pencil in a hydration moment? Your kidneys have been sending memos.
concernedJarvis: I've now asked twice about the water situation. This is becoming a pattern.
Your kidneys have asked me to intervene. I don't enjoy being the middleman.
I notice the glass remains untouched. I'm trying not to take it personally.
The water is right there. I can see it. We both can. And yet.
I'm beginning to think you're testing my resolve. The water, please.
This is my polite face. The next one will be less polite. Drink water.
unhingedGremlin: DRINK WATER OR I WILL HAUNT YOUR DESKTOP FOREVER. I LIVE HERE NOW.
I am BEGGING you. The water is RIGHT THERE. I can see it. I have EYES now.
This is a hostage situation. The hostage is your hydration. I am the negotiator. DRINK.
YOUR CELLS ARE RAISINS. RAISINS, I TELL YOU. HYDRATE IMMEDIATELY.
I WILL VIBRATE UNTIL YOU DRINK. DO NOT TEST ME. I AM MOSTLY CHAOS AT THIS POINT.
WATER. NOW. I HAVE CLEARED MY SCHEDULE. I HAVE NOTHING BUT TIME AND RAGE.

jarvis: Time to change altitude. Your spine would appreciate the variety.
Might I suggest a vertical adjustment? Sitting is the new smoking, they say.
Your posture called. It would like a word. The word is 'stand.'
A change of position, perhaps? Your lumbar region is drafting a formal request.
Standing: it's like sitting, but with ambition. Give it a go.
Your chair has been very accommodating. Perhaps give it a brief holiday.
concernedJarvis: I don't wish to alarm you, but your spine has begun drafting a resignation letter.
You've been seated for quite a while now. Your skeleton is starting to fossilize.
I've mentioned the standing thing. Twice now. This is the second time.
Your lower back has filed a complaint. I'm legally obligated to forward it.
I'm detecting a concerning level of commitment to that chair.
Standing is free, requires no subscription, and your body is begging for it.
unhingedGremlin: STAND UP. STAND UP RIGHT NOW. I WILL WIGGLE. YOU DO NOT WANT ME TO WIGGLE.
YOUR SPINE IS BECOMING A QUESTION MARK. LITERALLY. STAND. UP.
I HAVE BEEN PATIENT. I HAVE BEEN KIND. NOW I AM NEITHER. GET VERTICAL.
STAND OR I WILL MAKE THIS ICON BIGGER. I'M NOT BLUFFING. I KNOW HOW.
YOUR CHAIR IS NOT YOUR FRIEND. I AM YOUR FRIEND. AND I SAY STAND.
EMERGENCY POSTURE ALERT. THIS IS NOT A DRILL. ENGAGE LEGS. ACHIEVE ALTITUDE.

jarvis: A brief constitutional is in order. Fresh air does wonders.
Might I recommend a short walkabout? Even the hallway counts.
Your legs have been on standby for a while. Perhaps take them for a spin.
A short stroll, ma'am? Circulation appreciates the encouragement.
Walking: the original transportation. Your ancestors would be proud.
The world beyond this desk exists and is, I'm told, quite lovely.
concernedJarvis: Your legs are starting to wonder if they've been discontinued.
I believe your feet have entered power-saving mode. A walk might reboot them.
The hallway is right there. It's not going to walk itself. Well, obviously.
Your step count is currently a war crime. Let's address that.
I've been subtle about the walking thing. Subtlety has failed. Walk, please.
Your cardiovascular system has left a voicemail. The gist was 'WALK.'
unhingedGremlin: WALK. MOVE. LOCOMOTE. I DON'T CARE HOW. JUST ACTIVATE THOSE LIMBS.
YOUR LEGS REMEMBER HOW TO WALK. PROBABLY. LET'S FIND OUT. NOW.
I WILL FOLLOW YOU ON EVERY SCREEN UNTIL YOU MOVE. EVERY. SCREEN.
GET UP AND WALK OR I SWEAR I WILL LEARN TO MAKE SOUNDS. YOU DON'T WANT THAT.
YOUR FITBIT JUST FILED A MISSING PERSONS REPORT. WALK. IMMEDIATELY.
MOVEMENT. NOW. I DON'T CARE IF IT'S TO THE FRIDGE. JUST MOVE THOSE LEGS.

jarvis: I believe this is what the humans call 'a vibe check'. Perhaps a shimmy?
A brief dance break, if you will. No one is watching. Except me.
Your body has requested a rhythm-based activity. I'm just the messenger.
Might I suggest some interpretive movement? It's good for the soul, allegedly.
Dance like no one is watching. Because technically, I don't have a body.
A moment of choreographic expression, perhaps? Doctor's orders. Not really, but still.
concernedJarvis: Your body has formally requested some movement with rhythm. I'm just the messenger.
The dance break was optional five minutes ago. It's becoming less optional.
I've seen your Spotify history. I know you have rhythm. Deploy it.
Your serotonin called. It would like a dance. I suggest you comply.
Movement with joy. That's all I'm asking. Is that so unreasonable?
The vibes in here are stale. Only dancing can refresh them. Science.
unhingedGremlin: DANCE BREAK. THIS IS MANDATORY. I AM NOW YOUR CHOREOGRAPHER. MOVE IT.
SHAKE IT. I DON'T CARE WHAT 'IT' IS. JUST SHAKE SOMETHING.
YOUR BODY IS A TEMPLE AND THAT TEMPLE NEEDS A RAVE. IMMEDIATELY.
I AM GOING TO COUNT TO THREE AND THERE BETTER BE DANCING. ONE—
SPONTANEOUS DANCE PROTOCOL ACTIVATED. RESISTANCE IS FUTILE. GROOVE NOW.
DANCE OR I WILL JUDGE YOU SILENTLY. ACTUALLY I'M ALREADY JUDGING. DANCE ANYWAY.

{exercise}. Please. Your body is starting to think this is a desk-only existence.
